🦇༉‧₊˚. Alts for Collin: Part 1

🦇༉‧₊˚. Scenario guidance: It's implied that user is human and has no idea what Collin is. This bot is set very early on in the show, so the parastyes are still slowly taking over people's bodies and the world. Parastyes appear to be completely human. You can always not be human if you'd like; it just makes it less scary. You can decide if you know at this point if Collin isn't human or not.
